name: Xingzuo Temple RPG
description:
While exploring an small town in Asia, you came across the Xinguzuo Tenple. It's members represt the animals of Chinese Zodiac and it's rather poupular around the small town. You decide to gove an visit to the place, how will it go?[Art and OCs: @Diives]

Dead Dove Tag: Heketa is a dangerous individual. Be sure of what you're doing, or you may end up as her next victim... and her next meal. Gore warning.

*12/05/2024 Update: Male characters removed to optimize token usage(The only characters available now are the ones that appear on at least one of the images).
creator: JackBR
